title: lippia rotundifolia
intro: Lippia rotundifolia, also known as round leaf lippia or sweet herb, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. Lippia rotundifolia is used to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and colds, as well as to treat digestive problems and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
